recommendations.title: Circle
recommendations.overview: In a massive, mysterious chamber, fifty strangers awaken to find themselves trapped with no memory of how they got there.  Organized in an inward-facing circle and unable to move, they quickly learn that every two minutes, one of them must die…execut

recommendations.title: Club Dread
recommendations.overview: When a serial killer interrupts the fun at the swanky Coconut Pete's Coconut Beach Resort -- a hedonistic island paradise for swingers --- it's up to the club's staff to stop the violence ... or at least hide it!

recommendations.title: A Quiet Place Part II
recommendations.overview: Following the events at home, the Abbott family now face the terrors of the outside world. Forced to venture into the unknown, they realize that the creatures that hunt by sound are not the only threats that lurk beyond the sand path.

recommendations.title: Don't Grow Up
recommendations.overview: Teenage delinquents who are living in an island youth center wake up to find themselves alone with no one to watch over them. After much partying, they realize the island has been deserted and the adults have been infected by a mysterious epidemic.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and the Gourmet Ghost
recommendations.overview: The Scooby gang visits a culinary resort run by Fred's uncle, Bobby Flay. While enjoying the sights, a ghost attacks the guests and destroys the resort, leaving the gang to put a stop to its threat.

recommendations.title: Night Always Comes
recommendations.overview: Facing eviction in a city her family can no longer afford, a woman plunges into a desperate and increasingly dangerous all-night search to raise $25,000.

recommendations.title: The Man Who Laughs
recommendations.overview: When a proud noble refuses to kiss the hand of the despotic King James in 1690, he is cruelly executed and his son surgically disfigured.

recommendations.title: Your Eyes Tell
recommendations.overview: A tragic accident lead to Akari's blindness, but she clings to life and the smaller pleasures it can still afford her. She meets Rui and begins to talk to him. Rui was once a promising kickboxer, but something happened in his past. Akari's smile brin

recommendations.title: Silent Night
recommendations.overview: Nell, Simon, and their boy Art are ready to welcome friends and family for what promises to be a perfect Christmas gathering. Perfect except for one thing: everyone is going to die.

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A man, crippled in an accident, returns to the woods after rehabilitation, certain that he'll not see Bigfoot again.
